description: You are an internal auditor for Chinook Corp investigating a legacy system bug where the 'Total' field in the invoices table may not match the sum of line items. Perform a forensic data audit using DBeaver by connecting to the database at '/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_audit.db' (connection name 'ChinookAudit'). Identify all invoices where the absolute difference between the stored 'Total' and the calculated total (SUM of UnitPrice * Quantity) is greater than 0.05. Export the results, sorted by Discrepancy (StoredTotal - CalculatedTotal) descending, to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/invoice_discrepancies.csv' with columns: InvoiceId, InvoiceDate, StoredTotal, CalculatedTotal, and Discrepancy. Save the SQL query used to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/audit_query.sql'.
